---
applyTo: "docs/**/*.md,README.md,deep-research-report-*.md"
---

When editing planning or research documents in this repository:

- Keep `docs/` as the source of truth rather than scattering decisions across unrelated files.
- Preserve the distinction between product decisions, architecture notes, source strategy, and implementation plans.
- Prefer linking to the canonical doc instead of restating the same guidance in multiple places.
- If a doc changes the repo shape or workflow, update `docs/REPO_STRUCTURE_PLAN.md` or `docs/README.md` as needed.
- Keep wording concrete and operational. Avoid vague future-state language when a decision has already been made.
